---
name: Translation fix or improvement
about: Propose a fix or improvement to an English translation in the corpus
title: "[translation] <law> Art. <N> — short description"
labels: translation
assignees: ''
---

## Article affected

- **Law:** Ley 21.521 / Ley 19.628 consolidated (delete one)
- **Article:** Art. <N> (e.g., `Art. 3(2)` or `Art. 8 bis`)
- **File:** `corpus/<path>.md`

## Current English text

> Paste the current English text from the corpus.

## Original Spanish

> Paste the verbatim Spanish block as it appears in the corpus.

## Proposed change

> Paste the proposed English wording.

## Rationale

Explain why the proposed change is more accurate. Cite the lexicon entry, a Chilean legal-drafting convention, or a published interpretation.

If your proposal requires a translator's note (`> **TN:** ...`), draft it here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I checked `corpus/_lexicon.md` for the relevant terms.
- [ ] I confirmed the Spanish block in the corpus matches the source PDF (the round-trip check still passes for this article).
- [ ] My proposal is a literal rendering, not a paraphrase or expansion.
- [ ] If this resolves a `<!-- REVIEW: -->` marker, I noted which one.
